Layout Debugger Test Page

Open DevTools, select an element, run whyThisSize($0)

Block Layout

Auto width block (fills container)
Explicit 300×100px block

Flex Layout

flex: 1
flex: 2
flex: 0 0 120px

Grid Layout

1fr
2fr
1fr
spans columns 1–2
1fr (row 2)

Positioned

Absolute: top/left/right set
Abs: 100×50px

Inline / Inline-block

inline span
inline-block 150px
inline-block 150px

Nested Flex

A
B
C
D
E

Min/Max Constraints

min: 200px, max: 250px
min: 200px, max: 250px
min: 200px, max: 250px

Nested Overflow (App Layout)

Header (48px fixed)
Sidebar (150px)
Toolbar (36px)
This content is 800×600px — much larger than the scroll panel. The chain is: viewport (600×400, column flex) → header (48px) + body (flex:1, row flex) → sidebar (150px) + main (flex:1, column flex) → toolbar (36px) + scroll-panel (flex:1, overflow:auto). Try whyThisSize on the scroll-panel to trace the full chain!
